name: DeepL API
what_it_does: Neural machine translation API that delivers human-quality translations across 30+ languages, with an official MCP server for agent integration.
use_cases: Translating user-generated content or documents at scale
Localizing software interfaces and marketing copy
Real-time translation in chat or messaging workflows
Translating structured data (JSON, XML, HTML) preserving formatting
not_for: Languages outside DeepL's supported set (many Asian, African languages missing)
Free high-volume workloads (rate limits are strict on free tier)
best_when: Quality of translation matters more than cost, especially for European language pairs.
avoid_when: You need to translate to/from languages not in DeepL's catalog or require very high free-tier volume.

auth.notes: Single DeepL-Auth-Key header. Free and Pro keys are distinguished by ':fx' suffix on free keys. Simple to implement for agents.

pricing.paid_tiers: Pro plans from $7.49/month for 1M characters; usage-based beyond that
pricing.notes: Free tier is generous for prototyping. Pro API pricing is character-based; the document translation API has separate pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Free: 100 requests per day cap in some regions; Pro: no hard request limit

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: HTTP errors include a descriptive message. Quota exceeded errors clearly indicate the limit hit.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Translation requests are inherently idempotent - same input always produces equivalent output.
known_agent_gotchas: Free API keys end in ':fx' - using one for Pro-only features returns 403, not a clear quota error
HTML tag handling requires explicit tag_handling parameter or tags get mangled in translation
The glossary feature requires pre-creating glossaries via a separate API call before use in translation
Character count includes spaces and HTML tags when tag_handling is set
Some language codes use regional variants (e.g., 'pt-PT' vs 'pt-BR') that must be specified explicitly

security_score_components.security_notes: Single API key auth. EU-hosted service — GDPR-compliant by design. Data privacy: text sent for translation is not stored for training. ISO 27001 certified. No scope granularity — key has full quota access.
